lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be functional. Both the interior and exterior show extensive wear and damage.

This is a fantastic find for anyone looking for a reliable vehicle that’s been well-loved! It runs smoothly and is in good overall condition, showing just the expected minor wear for its age. It’s been consistently maintained and is ready to provide many more miles of great driving. A solid choice that balances performance and value perfectly!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are fully operational.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep shine and no chips or scratches, while the interior remains in like-new condition with no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with every system functioning exactly as intended and a complete service history documenting its care. It offers a smooth, quiet, and reliable driving experience, representing a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and treated with the utmost care.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior remains in a pristine, original state with no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history. It drives exactly as it did when it first left the factory, offering a smooth, quiet, and powerful experience. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a car that has been cared for to the highest possible standard.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to quality and enduring value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape and runs like a dream—absolutely perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. I’ve taken really nice care of it, so it’s clean, reliable, and totally ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp with a
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Title in hand. Ready for pickup.

This 2018 Executive Sport Sedan has been kept in excellent running order and shows clear pride of ownership. The exterior features a lustrous metallic finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, maintaining an impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is refined and well-preserved, featuring supple leather seating, fully functional dual-zone climate control, and an intuitive infotainment system. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring a reliable and engaging driving experience. With a clean title, ample tire tread, and a comprehensive maintenance log included, this vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance for the discerning buyer.

This well-appointed vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a reliable and sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. An excellent acquisition for those who demand quality and proven dependability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional synthesis of performance and reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in commendable condition. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated driving experience and long-term value without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s looking for a brand-new home! It’s in wonderful shape, runs like a total dream, and has been super well-loved during its time with me. It’s absolutely perfect for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—I promise you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 represents a driver-focused example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L high-revving inline-six features a bulletproofed VANOS system and individual throttle bodies for razor-sharp induction response. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual and a GKN variable M differential. Crucially, the rear subframe has been reinforced to mitigate floor pan fatigue. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein B6 dampers and refreshed control arm bushings, maintaining the signature 50/50 weight distribution. While the finish shows light road-going character, the mechanical drivetrain remains tight and responsive, providing an unfiltered analog driving experience.
Reliable vehicle in good condition. Clean interior. Regularly serviced. Runs smoothly. No mechanical issues.

Experience the perfect blend of performance and reliability with this well-maintained vehicle. Finished in a classic, deep metallic paint that still holds a high-gloss shine, the exterior shows only minor signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and strong, having benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule and recent fluid changes. The tires offer excellent tread life, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car has been a dependable companion and is ready to provide its next owner with years of worry-free driving. It’s a solid, honest vehicle that strikes the ideal balance between luxury and everyday practicality.

Presented here is a distinguished example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard. This vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by consistent mechanical performance and a well-preserved aesthetic. Thoroughly vetted by our senior technicians, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophistication and proven reliability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. This automobile has undergone a comprehensive mechanical evaluation to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. With a documented history of consistent care, it represents an outstanding opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both value and mechanical integrity. We invite you to experience the refined driving dynamics and sophisticated engineering that define this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved and cared for over the years. It's the perfect find for someone looking for a reliable, smooth car that’s ready to hit the road today! You’re going to love how it handles—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Experience the pinnacle of BMW’s naturally aspirated era with this E46 M3. Under the hood, the S54B32 inline
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained luxury sport sedan offers a refined driving experience with a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a brilliant luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and well-aligned. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal wear, a power sunroof, and a fully functional infotainment suite. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has a documented history of regular synthetic oil changes, the brakes are responsive, and the tires offer substantial tread life for the seasons ahead. The engine runs smoothly without any warning lights, and the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with respect by its previous owner.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained to ensure peak performance and reliability, this unit features a comprehensive service history and a refined interior. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated driving experience. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous inspection process to guarantee its readiness for immediate acquisition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point mechanical inspection, the unit exhibits consistent performance and aesthetic integrity. It serves as a testament to engineering excellence, offering a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value for those who demand both reliability and prestige.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in great shape and has been well-loved, making it a perfect pick if you're looking for something solid and ready for the road. It runs smoothly and looks fantastic—honestly, it’s just a really dependable car that still has so much life left in it. I'd love for it to go to a good home where it'll be appreciated! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin!

This Porsche Cayman S features a mid-mounted 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six engine delivering linear power through a 6-speed manual gearbox. Equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a mechanical limited-slip differential, the chassis offers exceptional torsional rigidity and neutral handling characteristics. The vehicle has been fastidiously maintained with documented service intervals, ensuring the valvetrain and cooling systems are in optimal operating condition. While showing minor aesthetic patina from road use, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain sharp. Recent updates include refreshed bushings and high-performance brake pads, making this a turn-key driver's car for the discerning enthusiast.
Well-maintained vehicle. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Minor exterior wear. Ready for daily use.

Presenting a meticulously maintained 2019 Lexus RX 350 in a sophisticated Pearl White finish. This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like shine, though close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with highway commuting. Inside, the Parchment leather interior is in excellent shape, showing only slight softening on the driver’s seat bolster. All premium features, including the panoramic sunroof, heated and ventilated seats, and the intuitive navigation system, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the V6 engine delivers a smooth, quiet ride, having been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The tires offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead, and the brakes feel firm and responsive. This is a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle that has been garage-kept and treated with care. It’s ready for its next owner to enjoy a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic, this model balances proven performance with enduring value. We invite you to secure a vehicle that reflects a high standard of automotive care and professional stewardship.
